allow: PowerShell(claude mcp add --transport http --scope user cloudflare https://mcp.cloudflare.com/mcp)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:APPDATA\\npm\\claude.cmd", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\claude\\claude.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\bin\\claude.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\local\\claude.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p" } }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json"\) { "CONFIG EXISTS: $env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Top-level keys:"; $j.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ", "; ""; "Existing user-scope mcpServers:"; if \($j.mcpServers\) { $j.mcpServers | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } else { "\(none\)" })
WebFetch(domain:www.tampatower.org)
PowerShell(Resolve-DnsName -Name tampatower.org -Type NS -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Resolve-DnsName -Name www.tampatower.org -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://rdap.org/domain/tampatower.org" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "REGISTRAR:"; \($r.entities | Where-Object { $_.roles -contains "registrar" }\).vcardArray[1] | ForEach-Object { $_ -join " | " }; Write-Output "`nEVENTS:"; $r.events | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.eventAction\): $\($_.eventDate\)" }; Write-Output "`nSTATUS:"; $r.status } catch { Write-Output "RDAP failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "==== MX ===="; Resolve-DnsName tampatower.org -Type MX -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object NameExchange,Preference | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "==== TXT ===="; Resolve-DnsName tampatower.org -Type TXT -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.Strings }; Write-Output "==== apex A ===="; Resolve-DnsName tampatower.org -Type A -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Output "node: $\(node --version 2>$null\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(npm --version 2>$null\)"; Write-Output "git: $\(git --version 2>$null\)"; Write-Output "---- C:\\ClaudeCode contents ----"; Get-ChildItem C:\\ClaudeCode -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Mode,Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm","$env:APPDATA\\npm","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---- winget ----"; try { winget --version } catch { Write-Output "winget missing" }; Write-Output "---- fnm/nvm/volta on PATH ----"; foreach \($c in @\('fnm','nvm','volta','pnpm','yarn'\)\) { $cmd = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output "$c -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } })
PowerShell(winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements --silent -e 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Write-Output "node: $\(node --version\)"; Write-Output "npm: $\(npm --version\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location C:\\ClaudeCode; npm install --no-fund --no-audit 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 12)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location C:\\ClaudeCode; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location C:\\ClaudeCode; npm run dev)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\ClaudeCode\\incoming -Recurse -File | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location C:\\ClaudeCode; node scripts/process-logo.mjs 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location C:\\ClaudeCode; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location C:\\ClaudeCode; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location C:\\ClaudeCode; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
